themes: A large share of contacts have been waiting well over 90 days—some approaching a full year—signaling a systemic need to prioritize and accelerate Product outreach before more goodwill erodes.

Multi-location franchise and property-management brands (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, Avenue5 Residential) appear repeatedly, suggesting the backlog is concentrated in complex, high-location-count accounts with sophisticated reporting and workflow needs.

Nearly all contacts are Managers rather than Administrators or end Users, indicating that the dominant pain points likely center on day-to-day operational efficiency—reporting, location-level task management, and time savings—rather than purely strategic or governance-level concerns.
